description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a light natural finish, featuring four straight legs and a single central drawer. The tabletop is broad and flat, with a subtle wood grain pattern visible across its surface. The drawer is integrated into the front side of the table and has a small round knob for easy opening and closing. The construction appears sturdy, with the legs positioned at each corner for stability. There are no visible decorative elements or embellishments, giving the table a minimalist and functional appearance. The overall design suggests it is suitable for work, dining, or general utility in urban environments.
description: A light wood rectangular table with four legs and a central drawer, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: The table is seen from the side, showing the full length of the tabletop and the drawer partially extended on the right.
description_view_1: The table is viewed from the front, clearly displaying the central drawer pulled out and all four legs.
description_view_2: The table is seen from the opposite side of view 0, with the drawer partially extended on the left.
description_view_3: The table is viewed from the back, with the drawer barely visible and the tabletop and legs in full view.
